EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {protocol} connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is allowed
A {protocol} connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is detected
A {protocol} connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied. Reason: {reason}.
